title: A Prisoner
content:
The hinges are so rusty
    The door is fixed and fast;
    The windows are so dusty
    The sun looks in aghast:
    Knock out the glass, I pray,
    Or dash the door away,
    Or break the house down bodily,
    And let my soul go free!
meaning:
This evocative piece by George MacDonald, titled "A Prisoner", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
